title: rubus horrens
intro: Rubus horrens, also known as the thorny raspberry or bristly dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Rubus horrens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it beneficial for overall health. Herbal preparations of Rubus horrens can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
